input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IC.2.3.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ic.2.3.3
            TITLE: intake systems with significant mass or cantilever from the cylinder head must be supported

            CONTENT:
            rule IC.2.3.3: Intake systems with significant mass or cantilever from the cylinder head must be supported
IC.2.3.3 Intake systems with significant mass or cantilever from the cylinder head must be supported 
to prevent stress to the intake system.   
a. Supports to the engine must be rigid.   
b. Supports to the Chassis must incorporate some isolation to allow for engine movement 
and chassis flex.

final_answer: Intake systems with significant mass or cantilever from the cylinder head must be supported to prevent stress to the intake system. a. Supports to the engine must be rigid. b. Supports to the Chassis must incorporate some isolation to allow for engine movement and chassis flex.
